name: Small People Defense
short_description: Use projectile-based towers, unique tower interactions, and overpowered weapons to strategically conquer the endless waves in this 3rd-person tower defense game!
detailed_description:
Challenge yourself in this 3rd-person TD game by rushing waves to get huge rewards and optimizing your cash production. Or enjoy casually powering up your towers and growing your small person into the largest in the world!

FEATURES

  • 30+ endless levels with tutorials

  • Mazing levels, sandbox mode, and leaderboards

  • 5 different characters

  • 6 unique weapons

  • 6 towers with power ups

  • 20+ enemy types including 6 challenging bosses

Explore the deep strategy involving enemy abilities, tower interactions, tower placements, rushing waves, and more!

There are many tactics you need to employ to survive. One mechanic involves breaking the barbarian's shield, which requires inflicting the burn and slow status before stunning it with lightning. Another is with tower placements because projectiles will miss if enemies are not properly aligned with its path. Min-maxing involves rushing waves which gives you 3 times as much cash but 80% less time to defeat your enemies! And these are only a few of the many mechanics in this game.

Gain permanent power ups and use unlockable weapons to open the endless possibilities.

And a huge thanks to the creators of the assets from the Unreal Engine Marketplace (see credits page on website). Thanks for playing!
